subcodes.title: Words to Baha'is of Paris, 1911-10-14
subcodes.first_line: This is the second time that we have come into the gathering of the beloved friends in Paris. Praise be to God, I behold the faces of the loved ones [3.5s]... ...The day is approaching when ye shall witness how, through the splendor of the Faith of Baha'u'llah the West will have replaced the East
subcodes.first_line_orig: این دفعه دوم است که در مجمع احبای پاریس آمدیم الحمد لله می بینم رویهای احبای
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @disregarding individual capacity; weakness, @spiritual transformation, @East and West; communication between East and West, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @growth of the Cause
